creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks. Committed with minor changes: USE_GITHUB under modernize blanket.
Ports r381618 explains why checksum is different. Tested with |diff -rN| to have zero changes.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-distfiles.html#makefile-master_sites-github-description
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports-announce/2014-January/000073.html

Note, ports r384932 recently changed DISTNAME for some USE_GITHUB ports. If this port fails to fetch make sure your tree is in sync.
